reviews.review_description:
I played the game and I know I can enjoy he game. The only problem is there are bugs within the game such as the Press A button to interact do not work and when trying to put clothes on the rack, and or trying to take the payment from customers it do not work. Then I would quit the game, all the clothes and money are gone nothing is refunded. I know the game just came out but please fix the A button so I can play the game because without that I am unable to play.

 Also can  we the subtitles letting us know what to do remove it from the side of the face because it is hard to read it.
